query:
INSERT INTO laws_positions (title, description, pillar, department, employment_type, salary_min, salary_max, requirements, qualifications, progression_path_id, status) VALUES
-- LAND Pillar Positions
('Property Assistant', 'Entry-level property management support role. Assists with tenant relations, maintenance coordination, and property documentation.', 'LAND', 'Property Management', 'w2_full_time', 35000, 45000, 'High school diploma, valid drivers license, basic computer skills', 'Customer service experience preferred, interest in real estate', 1, 'open'),
('Land Stewardship Coordinator', 'Manages agricultural and land development projects. Coordinates community garden initiatives.', 'LAND', 'Land Development', 'w2_full_time', 45000, 55000, 'Associates degree or equivalent experience, knowledge of sustainable practices', 'Agricultural experience, project management skills', 1, 'open'),

-- AIR Pillar Positions
('Teaching Assistant', 'Supports Academy instructors with curriculum delivery, student engagement, and classroom management.', 'AIR', 'Education', 'w2_full_time', 32000, 42000, 'High school diploma, passion for education, strong communication skills', 'Teaching experience preferred, subject matter knowledge', 2, 'open'),
('Curriculum Developer', 'Creates and updates educational content for L.A.W.S. Academy programs across all age groups.', 'AIR', 'Education', 'w2_full_time', 50000, 65000, 'Bachelors degree in Education or related field, curriculum design experience', 'Experience with diverse learners, digital content creation', 2, 'open'),

-- WATER Pillar Positions
('Wellness Coordinator', 'Facilitates wellness programs, coordinates healing services, and supports community health initiatives.', 'WATER', 'Health Services', 'w2_full_time', 38000, 48000, 'Certification in wellness or health coaching, empathetic communication', 'Experience in community health, counseling background preferred', 3, 'open'),
('Community Health Navigator', 'Connects community members with health resources, coordinates care, and tracks wellness outcomes.', 'WATER', 'Health Services', 'w2_full_time', 42000, 52000, 'Associates degree in health-related field, knowledge of community resources', 'Bilingual preferred, experience with underserved populations', 3, 'open'),

-- SELF Pillar Positions
('Business Support Specialist', 'Provides administrative and operational support to L.A.W.S. businesses and member entrepreneurs.', 'SELF', 'Business Services', 'w2_full_time', 35000, 45000, 'High school diploma, strong organizational skills, basic financial literacy', 'Customer service experience, interest in entrepreneurship', 4, 'open'),
('Financial Literacy Coach', 'Delivers financial education workshops, provides one-on-one coaching, and tracks participant progress.', 'SELF', 'Financial Services', 'w2_full_time', 48000, 60000, 'Bachelors degree or equivalent experience, financial literacy certification', 'Coaching experience, knowledge of personal and business finance', 4, 'open');
